title: context-profile
description: Extracted and assessor-confirmed submission context. First-order determinants of the assessment framework. Produced by context-extractor, confirmed at Confirmation Point 1.

company_name.description: Name of the company submitting the business case.

funding_stage.description: Identified funding stage of the submission.

vertical.description: Industry vertical (e.g., MedTech, FinTech, SaaS, AgriTech, EdTech, CleanTech, DeepTech, Consumer, MarketplaceTech, PropTech, LegalTech, HRTech, etc.)

sub_vertical.description: More specific sub-vertical classification if applicable.

revenue_architecture.description: How the business generates or plans to generate revenue.

primary_model.description: Primary revenue model (e.g., SaaS subscription, transaction fee, licensing, usage-based, direct sales, freemium, etc.)

recurring_revenue_present.description: Whether recurring revenue elements exist or are planned.

geography.description: Geographic context for the submission and assessment.

primary_market.description: Primary market the startup operates in or targets.

assessor_geographic_frame.description: Geographic calibration frame confirmed by assessor (e.g., GCC/MENA, Global, North America, Europe, Southeast Asia, etc.)

ask.description: The funding or investment ask as described in the submission.

amount.description: Amount requested (e.g., '$2M', '$500K–$1M'). String to accommodate ranges.

use_of_proceeds_summary.description: Brief summary of stated use of proceeds.

regulatory_exposure.description: Regulatory context assessment — determines whether Regulatory domain is activated.

has_regulatory_exposure.description: Whether the submission's vertical carries material regulatory exposure.

regulatory_domain_active.description: Whether the Regulatory & Compliance domain is activated for this assessment.

applicable_frameworks.description: Regulatory frameworks identified as applicable (e.g., FDA 510(k), EU MDR, SAMA, SFDA, ADGM, DFSA, GDPR, PCI-DSS, etc.)

activation_rationale.description: Reasoning for regulatory domain activation or non-activation.

traction_status.description: Current traction stage of the company.

team_structure.description: Basic team structure signals extracted from submission.

extraction_basis.description: Documents the basis on which each signal was identified.

extracted_from_submission.description: Fields extracted directly from the submission document.

confirmed_by_assessor.description: Fields corrected or confirmed by assessor at Confirmation Point 1.

inferred_with_uncertainty.description: Fields inferred with uncertainty — flagged for assessor review.

confirmation_status.description: Whether this profile has been confirmed at Confirmation Point 1.

assessor_corrections.description: Corrections applied by the assessor at Confirmation Point 1.
